ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8020_Bypass_Opp_V_RULE) , DateValue(CreatedDate) >= $Setup.CSET_9900__c.OppCutoverDate__c , fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process" , TEXT(StageName)='Abandoned' , OR( AND( PRIORVALUE(StageNumber__c) >=3 , PRIORVALUE(StageNumber__c) <=5 ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_073: To abandon at stage 1 or 2, ensure the "Closed Reason Detail" is filled in. From stage 3 and after, you can only move to "Closed Lost" and will need to supply the "Closed Reason Detail".
